title: The Elara Penthouse
description: Soaring above the Upper East Side, this full-floor penthouse commands panoramic views of Central Park with interiors by AD100 designer Thomas Phifer.

title: Malibu Shore Villa
description: An architectural masterpiece of glass and steel set directly on the sand. Floor-to-ceiling walls dissolve the boundary between interior and the Pacific horizon.

title: The Meridian
description: Perched atop one of South Beach's most coveted towers, this sky-high residence offers unobstructed ocean views and resort-caliber amenities.

title: Aspen Summit Lodge
description: A contemporary mountain retreat with ski-in/ski-out access, a glass-enclosed spa, and interiors that celebrate the surrounding alpine landscape.

title: The Carlyle Residence
description: A legendary estate behind private gates. Championship tennis court, infinity pool, screening room, and staff quarters on nearly two acres of manicured grounds.

title: Lake Shore Manor
description: A rare double-unit combination on Chicago's Gold Coast with breathtaking lake frontage, herringbone oak floors, and a curated art-gallery entry hall.

title: Pacific Heights Estate
description: A fully restored Edwardian mansion with original coffered ceilings, a chef's kitchen of honed marble, and a wraparound garden terrace with Bay views.

title: The Waldorf Tower
description: White-glove living within one of New York's most storied addresses. Original Art Deco details preserved alongside a complete contemporary renovation.

title: Coral Gables Villa
description: A Mediterranean-inspired villa behind lush tropical landscaping with a resort pool, summer kitchen, and private boat dock on the Coral Gables Waterway.

title: Highland Park Mansion
description: A newly built French chateau on one of Highland Park's most prestigious streets, featuring a porte-cochere, wine cellar, and seamless indoor-outdoor living.

title: The Beacon Residences
description: An intimate pied-a-terre with Beacon Hill views, wide-plank walnut floors, and a private terrace perfect for watching the seasons change over the Charles River.

title: Sunset Ridge Estate
description: Straddling the ridge above Bel Air with city and ocean views in every direction. An entertainer's paradise with a motor court, two pools, and a private cinema.
